2023	# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
2024	# Main audit workflow
2025	# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
2026	async def run_audit(
2027	    port: int,
2028	    output_dir: Path,
2029	    headed: bool = False,
2030	) -> dict:
2031	    """Execute the full 79-check fire test audit."""
2032	    output_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
2033	
2034	    all_results: list[CheckResult] = []
2035	    all_screenshots: list[str] = []
2036	    console_errors: list = []
2037	
2038	    async with async_playwright() as pw:
2039	        browser = await pw.chromium.launch(headless=not headed)
2040	        context = await browser.new_context(
2041	            viewport={"width": 1920, "height": 1080},
2042	        )
2043	        page = await context.new_page()
2044	        page.set_default_navigation_timeout(PAGE_LOAD_TIMEOUT_MS)
2045	
2046	        # Collect console errors before navigation
2047	        page.on(
2048	            "console",
2049	            lambda msg: console_errors.append(msg) if msg.type == "error" else None,
2050	        )
2051	
2052	        # ---------------------------------------------------------------
2053	        # 1. Page load + hydration
2054	        # ---------------------------------------------------------------
2055	        dashboard_url = f"http://127.0.0.1:{port}/"
2056	        logger.info("Navigating to %s", dashboard_url)
2057	        await page.goto(dashboard_url, wait_until="domcontentloaded")
2058	
2059	        # Wait for scripts to initialize
2060	        logger.info("Waiting for page scripts to initialize (3s)...")
2061	        await page.wait_for_timeout(3000)
2062	
2063	        # Wait for snapshot hydration
2064	        logger.info(
2065	            "Waiting for hydration (target=%d events, timeout=%ds)...",
2066	            HYDRATION_TARGET, HYDRATION_TIMEOUT_S,
2067	        )
2068	        hydrated = await wait_for_hydration(page, HYDRATION_TARGET, HYDRATION_TIMEOUT_S)
2069	        if hydrated:
2070	            logger.info("Hydration complete.")
2071	        else:
2072	            event_count = await page.evaluate(
2073	                "() => { try { return state.eventCount || 0; } catch(e) { return 0; } }"
2074	            )
2075	            logger.warning(
2076	                "Hydration target not reached: %d/%d events. Proceeding anyway.",
2077	                event_count, HYDRATION_TARGET,
2078	            )
2079	
2080	        # ---------------------------------------------------------------
2081	        # 2. Set operator mode for initial checks
2082	        # ---------------------------------------------------------------
2083	        await switch_to_operator_mode(page)
2084	
2085	        # ---------------------------------------------------------------
2086	        # 3. Categories A, B, S (connectivity, timer, real-time)
2087	        # ---------------------------------------------------------------
2088	        logger.info("Running A. Connectivity & Hydration (A01-A06)...")
2089	        all_results.extend(await run_connectivity_checks(page))
2090	
2091	        logger.info("Running B. Timer System (B07-B10)...")
2092	        all_results.extend(await run_timer_checks(page))
2093	
2094	        logger.info("Running S. Real-time Updates (S78-S79)...")
2095	        all_results.extend(await run_realtime_checks(page))
2096	
2097	        # ---------------------------------------------------------------
2098	        # 4. Switch to research view -> D, E, F, G, H
2099	        # ---------------------------------------------------------------

2100	        logger.info("Running D. Metrics Display (D16-D21)...")
2101	        all_results.extend(await run_metrics_checks(page))
2102	
2103	        logger.info("Running E. Phase Stepper (E22-E24)...")
2104	        all_results.extend(await run_phase_stepper_checks(page))
2105	
2106	        logger.info("Running F. Quality Gates (F25-F26)...")
2107	        all_results.extend(await run_quality_gate_checks(page))
2108	
2109	        logger.info("Running G. Activity Log (G27-G29)...")
2110	        all_results.extend(await run_activity_log_checks(page))
2111	
2112	        logger.info("Running H. Research View (H30-H32)...")
2113	        all_results.extend(await run_research_view_checks(page))
2114	
2115	        # ---------------------------------------------------------------
2116	        # 5. Switch to evidence view -> I
2117	        # ---------------------------------------------------------------
2118	        logger.info("Running I. Evidence View (I33-I37)...")
2119	        all_results.extend(await run_evidence_view_checks(page))
2120	
2121	        # ---------------------------------------------------------------
2122	        # 6. Switch to report view -> J, K (citation modal)
2123	        # ---------------------------------------------------------------
2124	        logger.info("Running J. Report View (J38-J43)...")
2125	        all_results.extend(await run_report_view_checks(page))
2126	
2127	        logger.info("Running K. Citation System (K44-K50)...")
2128	        all_results.extend(await run_citation_checks(page))
2129	
2130	        # ---------------------------------------------------------------
2131	        # 7. Switch to advanced view -> L
2132	        # ---------------------------------------------------------------
2133	        logger.info("Running L. Advanced View (L51-L55)...")
2134	        all_results.extend(await run_advanced_view_checks(page))
2135	
2136	        # ---------------------------------------------------------------
2137	        # 8. Switch to campaigns view -> N
2138	        # ---------------------------------------------------------------
2139	        logger.info("Running N. Campaign View (N61-N62)...")
2140	        all_results.extend(await run_campaign_view_checks(page))
2141	
2142	        # ---------------------------------------------------------------
2143	        # 9. Switch to memory view -> O
2144	        # ---------------------------------------------------------------
2145	        logger.info("Running O. Memory View (O63)...")
2146	        all_results.extend(await run_memory_view_checks(page))
2147	
2148	        # ---------------------------------------------------------------
2149	        # 10. Switch to pipelines view -> P
2150	        # ---------------------------------------------------------------
2151	        logger.info("Running P. Pipelines View (P64-P66)...")
2152	        all_results.extend(await run_pipelines_view_checks(page))
2153	
2154	        # ---------------------------------------------------------------
2155	        # 11. Switch to user mode -> M
2156	        # ---------------------------------------------------------------
2157	        logger.info("Running M. Workspace / User Mode (M56-M60)...")
2158	        all_results.extend(await run_workspace_checks(page))
2159	
2160	        # ---------------------------------------------------------------
2161	        # 12. Navigation checks (C) -- mode-independent, do last since
2162	        #     it cycles through all views
2163	        # ---------------------------------------------------------------
2164	        logger.info("Running C. Navigation & View Switching (C11-C15)...")
2165	        await switch_to_operator_mode(page)
2166	        all_results.extend(await run_navigation_checks(page))
2167	
2168	        # ---------------------------------------------------------------
2169	        # 13. API smoke tests (Q) -- mode-independent
2170	        # ---------------------------------------------------------------
2171	        logger.info("Running Q. API Smoke Tests (Q67-Q72)...")
2172	        all_results.extend(await run_api_smoke_checks(page))
2173	
2174	        # ---------------------------------------------------------------
2175	        # 14. Visual checks (R) -- screenshots for each view
2176	        # ---------------------------------------------------------------
2177	        logger.info("Running R. Visual & Responsive (R73-R77)...")
2178	        visual_results, visual_screenshots = await run_visual_checks(
2179	            page, console_errors, output_dir
2180	        )
2181	        all_results.extend(visual_results)
2182	        all_screenshots.extend(visual_screenshots)
2183	
2184	        # ---------------------------------------------------------------
2185	        # Capture bug screenshots for failing checks
2186	        # ---------------------------------------------------------------
2187	        failed_checks = [r for r in all_results if not r.passed and r.severity != "info"]
2188	        if failed_checks:
2189	            logger.info("Capturing bug screenshots for %d failing checks...", len(failed_checks))
2190	            for check in failed_checks:
2191	                try:
2192	                    shot = await capture_bug_screenshot(page, check.check_id, output_dir)
2193	                    check.screenshot = shot
2194	                    all_screenshots.append(shot)
2195	                except Exception:
2196	                    pass  # Screenshot capture is best-effort
2197	
2198	        await browser.close()
2199	
2200	    # ---------------------------------------------------------------
2201	    # Generate report
2202	    # ---------------------------------------------------------------
2203	    report = generate_report(all_results, all_screenshots, console_errors, output_dir)
2204	    print_console_summary(report)
2205	
2206	    return report
2207	
2208	
2209	# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
2210	# CLI entry point
2211	# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
2212	def parse_args() -> argparse.Namespace:
2213	    """Parse command-line arguments."""
2214	    parser = argparse.ArgumentParser(
2215	        description="Exhaustive Playwright-based UI audit for the POLARIS dashboard (79 checks / 19 categories)"
2216	    )
2217	    parser.add_argument(
2218	        "--port",
2219	        type=int,
2220	        default=0,
2221	        help="Server port (0 = auto-detect free port)",
2222	    )
2223	    parser.add_argument(
2224	        "--output-dir",
2225	        type=str,
2226	        default=str(_DEFAULT_OUTPUT_DIR),
2227	        help=f"Output directory for report and screenshots (default: {_DEFAULT_OUTPUT_DIR})",
2228	    )
2229	    parser.add_argument(
2230	        "--trace",
2231	        type=str,
2232	        default=str(_TRACE_FILE),
2233	        help=f"Path to trace JSONL file (default: {_TRACE_FILE})",
2234	    )
2235	    parser.add_argument(
2236	        "--headed",
2237	        action="store_true",
2238	        help="Run browser in headed mode (visible window)",
2239	    )
2240	    return parser.parse_args()
2241	
2242	
2243	async def async_main() -> None:
2244	    """Async entry point: start server, run audit, cleanup."""
2245	    args = parse_args()
2246	    port = args.port if args.port > 0 else find_free_port()
2247	    output_dir = Path(args.output_dir)
2248	    trace_file = args.trace
2249	
2250	    logger.info("Audit output directory: %s", output_dir)
2251	    logger.info("Trace file: %s", trace_file)
2252	    logger.info("Using port: %d", port)
2253	
2254	    # Start the server
2255	    server_proc = start_server(port, trace_file, output_dir)
2256	    try:
2257	        # Wait for server to be ready
2258	        logger.info(
2259	            "Waiting up to %ds for server on port %d...",
2260	            SERVER_READY_TIMEOUT_S, port,
2261	        )
2262	        ready = await wait_for_server(port, SERVER_READY_TIMEOUT_S)
2263	        if not ready:
2264	            raise RuntimeError(
2265	                f"Server did not become ready within {SERVER_READY_TIMEOUT_S}s on port {port}"
2266	            )
2267	        logger.info("Server is ready.")
2268	
2269	        # Run the audit
2270	        report = await run_audit(port, output_dir, headed=args.headed)
2271	
2272	        # Exit with non-zero if any checks failed (excluding info)
2273	        real_failures = sum(
2274	            1 for cat_checks in report["categories"].values()
2275	            for c in cat_checks
2276	            if not c["passed"] and c.get("severity", "error") != "info"
2277	        )
2278	        if real_failures > 0:
2279	            logger.info("RESULT: %d check(s) FAILED. Exit code 1.", real_failures)
2280	            sys.exit(1)
2281	        else:
2282	            logger.info("RESULT: ALL checks PASSED. Exit code 0.")
2283	
2284	    finally:
2285	        stop_server(server_proc)
2286	        logger.info("Server stopped. Audit complete.")
2287	
2288	
2289	def main() -> None:
2290	    """Synchronous entry point."""
2291	    asyncio.run(async_main())
2292	
2293	
2294	if __name__ == "__main__":
2295	    main()
2296

content.text: This file (playwright_fire_test.py, name itself notable — "fire_test") is worth flagging at the file level: "fire_test" is informal/jocular for what's actually an exhaustive UI audit test suite. Now let's read the remaining two files.

content.content:
1	"""
2	Playwright-based INTERACTION audit for the POLARIS dashboard.
3	
4	Goes beyond the fire test (79 DOM existence checks) by clicking every button,
5	hovering every card, opening every modal, typing into every input, switching
6	every tab/view/mode and verifying the actual result — not just that an element
7	exists, but that it works.
8	
9	~58 interaction checks across 8 categories (IA-IH).
10	
11	Usage:
12	    python scripts/playwright_interaction_audit.py [--port PORT] [--output-dir DIR]
13	                                                   [--trace TRACE] [--headed]
14	
15	Requirements:
16	    - playwright (async_api)
17	    - scripts/live_server.py (FastAPI server)
18	    - A valid JSONL trace file
19	"""
20	
21	import argparse
22	import asyncio
23	import json
24	import logging
25	import os
26	import re
27	import socket
28	import subprocess
29	import sys
30	import time
31	from datetime import datetime, timezone
32	from pathlib import Path
33	from typing import Any
34	
35	from playwright.async_api import async_playwright, Page
36	
37	# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
38	# Project root (LAW VI -- no hard-coded paths)
39	# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
40	_PROJECT_ROOT = Path(__file__).resolve().parent.parent
41	_SCRIPTS_DIR = _PROJECT_ROOT / "scripts"
42	_LIVE_SERVER_SCRIPT = _SCRIPTS_DIR / "live_server.py"
43	_DEFAULT_OUTPUT_DIR = _PROJECT_ROOT / "outputs" / "interaction_audit"
44	_DEFAULT_TRACE = _PROJECT_ROOT / "logs" / "pg_trace_SHOWME_TEST_003.jsonl"
45	
46	# Fallback trace files in order of preference
47	_TRACE_CANDIDATES = [
48	    _PROJECT_ROOT / "logs" / "pg_trace_SHOWME_TEST_003.jsonl",
49	    _PROJECT_ROOT / "logs" / "pg_trace_SHOWME_TEST_002.jsonl",
50	]
51	
52	# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
53	# Timing constants (LAW VI -- configurable via env)
54	# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
55	SERVER_READY_TIMEOUT_S = int(os.getenv("PW_SERVER_READY_TIMEOUT", "30"))
56	SERVER_POLL_INTERVAL_S = float(os.getenv("PW_SERVER_POLL_INTERVAL", "0.5"))
57	HYDRATION_TIMEOUT_S = int(os.getenv("PW_HYDRATION_TIMEOUT", "90"))
58	HYDRATION_TARGET = int(os.getenv("PW_HYDRATION_TARGET", "800"))
59	PAGE_LOAD_TIMEOUT_MS = int(os.getenv("PW_PAGE_LOAD_TIMEOUT_MS", "60000"))
60	INTERACTION_TIMEOUT_MS = int(os.getenv("PW_INTERACTION_TIMEOUT_MS", "10000"))
61	
62	# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
63	# View names
64	# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
65	ALL_VIEWS = [
66	    "campaigns", "research", "evidence", "report",
67	    "memory", "pipelines", "advanced",
68	]
69	
70	ADV_TABS = ["queries", "sources", "storm", "trace", "cost"]
71	
72	# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
73	# Logging
74	# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
75	logging.basicConfig(
76	    level=logging.INFO,
77	    format="%(asctime)s [%(levelname)s] %(message)s",
78	    datefmt="%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S",
79	)
80	logger = logging.getLogger("interaction_audit")
81	
82	
83	# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
84	# Utility: find a free TCP port
85	# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
86	def find_free_port() -> int:
87	    with socket.socket(socket.AF_INET, socket.SOCK_STREAM) as sock:
88	        sock.bind(("127.0.0.1", 0))
89	        return sock.getsockname()[1]
90	
91	
92	# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
93	# Utility: wait for server readiness
94	# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
95	async def wait_for_server(port: int, timeout_s: int) -> bool:
96	    deadline = time.monotonic() + timeout_s
97	    while time.monotonic() < deadline:
98	        try:
99	            reader, writer = await asyncio.open_connection("127.0.0.1", port)
100	            writer.close()
101	            await writer.wait_closed()
102	            return True
103	        except (ConnectionRefusedError, OSError):
104	            await asyncio.sleep(SERVER_POLL_INTERVAL_S)
105	    return False
106	
107	
108	# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
109	# Server lifecycle (same pattern as fire test)
110	# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
111	def start_server(port: int, trace_file: str, log_dir: Path) -> subprocess.Popen:
112	    log_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
113	    server_log_path = log_dir / "interaction_audit_server.log"
114	    server_log_handle = open(server_log_path, "w", encoding="utf-8")
115	
116	    cmd = [
117	        sys.executable,
118	        str(_LIVE_SERVER_SCRIPT),
119	        "--port", str(port),
120	        "--trace", str(trace_file),
121	        "--no-tunnel",
122	    ]
123	    logger.info("Starting server: %s", " ".join(cmd))
124	    logger.info("Server log: %s", server_log_path)
125	
126	    proc = subprocess.Popen(
127	        cmd,
128	        stdout=server_log_handle,
129	        stderr=subprocess.STDOUT,
130	        cwd=str(_PROJECT_ROOT),
131	    )
132	    proc._log_handle = server_log_handle  # type: ignore[attr-defined]
133	    return proc
134	
135	
136	def stop_server(proc: subprocess.Popen) -> None:
137	    if proc.poll() is None:
138	        logger.info("Terminating server (pid=%d)", proc.pid)
139	        proc.terminate()
140	        try:
141	            proc.wait(timeout=5)
142	        except subprocess.TimeoutExpired:
143	            proc.kill()
144	            proc.wait(timeout=3)
145	    log_handle = getattr(proc, "_log_handle", None)
146	    if log_handle and not log_handle.closed:
147	        log_handle.close()
148	
149	
150	# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
151	# CheckResult (same as fire test)
152	# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
153	class CheckResult:
154	    def __init__(self, check_id: str, description: str, category: str):
155	        self.check_id = check_id
156	        self.description = description
157	        self.category = category
158	        self.passed: bool = False
159	        self.severity: str = "error"
160	        self.actual: Any = None
161	        self.expected: Any = None
162	        self.error: str | None = None
163	        self.screenshot: str | None = None
164	
165	    def set_pass(self, actual: Any = None, expected: Any = None) -> "CheckResult":
166	        self.passed = True
167	        self.actual = actual
168	        self.expected = expected
169	        return self
170	
171	    def set_fail(self, actual: Any = None, expected: Any = None, error: str | None = None) -> "CheckResult":
172	        self.passed = False
173	        self.actual = actual
174	        self.expected = expected
175	        self.error = error
176	        return self
177	
178	    def set_info(self, actual: Any = None, note: str | None = None) -> "CheckResult":
179	        self.passed = True
180	        self.severity = "info"
181	        self.actual = actual
182	        self.error = note
183	        return self
184	
185	    def to_dict(self) -> dict:
186	        result: dict[str, Any] = {
187	            "check_id": self.check_id,
188	            "description": self.description,
189	            "category": self.category,
190	            "passed": self.passed,
191	            "severity": self.severity,
192	            "actual": self.actual,
193	            "expected": self.expected,
194	        }
195	        if self.error:
196	            result["error"] = self.error
197	        if self.screenshot:
198	            result["screenshot"] = self.screenshot
199	        return result
200	
201	
202	# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
203	# DOM / Page helpers
204	# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
205	async def element_count(page: Page, selector: str) -> int:
206	    return await page.evaluate("(sel) => document.querySelectorAll(sel).length", selector)
207	
208	
209	async def element_text(page: Page, selector: str) -> str:
210	    return await page.evaluate(
211	        "(sel) => { const el = document.querySelector(sel); return el ? el.textContent.trim() : '__NOT_FOUND__'; }",
212	        selector,
213	    )
214	
215	
216	async def element_exists(page: Page, selector: str) -> bool:
217	    return await page.evaluate("(sel) => document.querySelector(sel) !== null", selector)
218	
219	
220	async def element_visible(page: Page, selector: str) -> bool:
221	    return await page.evaluate(
222	        """(sel) => {
223	            const el = document.querySelector(sel);
224	            if (!el) return false;
225	            const style = window.getComputedStyle(el);
226	            return style.display !== 'none' && style.visibility !== 'hidden' && style.opacity !== '0';
227	        }""",
228	        selector,
229	    )
230	
231	
232	async def wait_for_hydration(page: Page, target: int, timeout_s: int) -> bool:
233	    deadline = time.monotonic() + timeout_s
234	    while time.monotonic() < deadline:
235	        count = await page.evaluate("() => { try { return state.eventCount || 0; } catch(e) { return 0; } }")
236	        if count >= target:
237	            return True
238	        await asyncio.sleep(0.5)
239	    return False
240	
241	
242	async def switch_to_operator_mode(page: Page) -> None:
243	    await page.evaluate("if (typeof setViewMode === 'function') setViewMode('operator')")
244	    await page.wait_for_timeout(300)
245	
246	
247	async def switch_to_user_mode(page: Page) -> None:
248	    await page.evaluate("if (typeof setViewMode === 'function') setViewMode('user')")
249	    await page.wait_for_timeout(300)
250	
251	
252	async def switch_view(page: Page, view_name: str) -> None:
253	    await page.evaluate(f"switchView('{view_name}')")
254	    await page.wait_for_timeout(500)
255	
256	
257	async def capture_screenshot(page: Page, name: str, output_dir: Path) -> str:
258	    screenshots_dir = output_dir / "screenshots"
259	    screenshots_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
260	    file_path = screenshots_dir / f"{name}.png"
261	    await page.screenshot(path=str(file_path), full_page=False)
262	    return str(file_path)
263	
264	
265	# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
266	# IA. Citation System Interactions (IA01-IA13)
267	# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
268	async def run_citation_interactions(
269	    page: Page, output_dir: Path
270	) -> list[CheckResult]:
271	    """IA01-IA13: Citation chain modal, popover, preview interactions."""
272	    results: list[CheckResult] = []
273	
274	    # Ensure operator mode and report view for citations
275	    await switch_to_operator_mode(page)
276	    await switch_view(page, "report")
277	    await page.wait_for_timeout(500)
278	
279	    # --- IA01: Click 1st .cite-ref -> chain modal opens ---
280	    ia01 = CheckResult("IA01", "Click 1st .cite-ref opens chain modal with title", "IA. Citation Interactions")
281	    cite_count = await element_count(page, ".cite-ref")
282	    modal_opened = False
283	    first_cite_num = 0
284	    if cite_count > 0:
285	        first_cite_num = await page.evaluate(
286	            "() => { const el = document.querySelector('.cite-ref'); return el ? parseInt(el.dataset.cite || el.textContent.replace(/[^0-9]/g,'')) : 0; }"
287	        )
288	        # Use JS click — Playwright click() requires visibility but cite-refs may be off-screen
289	        await page.evaluate(
290	            "() => { const el = document.querySelector('.cite-ref'); if (el) el.click(); }"
291	        )
292	        await page.wait_for_timeout(1500)  # Wait for API fetch + render
293	        modal_opened = await page.evaluate(
294	            "() => { const m = document.getElementById('citation-chain-modal'); return m && m.classList.contains('visible'); }"
295	        )
296	        if modal_opened:
297	            title_text = await element_text(page, "#chain-title")
298	            if "Citation" in title_text:
299	                ia01.set_pass(actual=title_text, expected="Citation [N] title")
300	            else:
301	                ia01.set_fail(actual=title_text, expected="Citation [N] title", error=f"Title is '{title_text}'")
302	        else:
303	            ia01.set_fail(actual="modal not visible", expected="modal opens", error="Chain modal did not open on click")
304	    else:
305	        ia01.set_info(actual="no .cite-ref found", note="Cannot test: no citations in report")
306	    results.append(ia01)
307	    if modal_opened:
308	        await capture_screenshot(page, "ia01_chain_modal", output_dir)
309	
310	    # --- IA02: Summary tab has evidence cards with tier badges ---
311	    ia02 = CheckResult("IA02", "Summary tab has evidence cards with tier badges", "IA. Citation Interactions")
312	    if modal_opened:
313	        # Wait for chain data to load
314	        await page.wait_for_timeout(2000)
315	        ev_card_count = await element_count(page, ".chain-evidence-card")
316	        tier_badge_count = await element_count(page, ".chain-tier-badge")
317	        if ev_card_count > 0 and tier_badge_count > 0:
318	            ia02.set_pass(actual=f"{ev_card_count} cards, {tier_badge_count} badges", expected=">= 1 card with badge")
319	        else:
320	            ia02.set_fail(actual=f"{ev_card_count} cards, {tier_badge_count} badges", expected=">= 1 card with badge",
321	                          error="No evidence cards or tier badges in summary tab")
322	    else:
323	        ia02.set_info(actual="modal not opened", note="Skipped: chain modal did not open")
324	    results.append(ia02)
325	
326	    # --- IA03: Click Source Preview tab -> iframe with content ---
327	    ia03 = CheckResult("IA03", "Source Preview tab shows content (not 'unavailable')", "IA. Citation Interactions")
328	    if modal_opened:
329	        await page.evaluate("switchChainTab('preview')")
330	        await page.wait_for_timeout(3000)  # Wait for preview API fetch
331	        preview_pane_html = await page.evaluate(
332	            "() => { const p = document.getElementById('chain-pane-preview'); return p ? p.innerHTML.length : 0; }"
333	        )
334	        has_iframe = await element_exists(page, "#chain-preview-iframe")
335	        has_fallback = await page.evaluate(
336	            "() => { const p = document.getElementById('chain-pane-preview'); return p && p.querySelector('.chain-fallback-quote') !== null; }"
337	        )
338	        if has_iframe or has_fallback or preview_pane_html > 200:
339	            ia03.set_pass(actual=f"html={preview_pane_html}, iframe={has_iframe}, fallback={has_fallback}",
340	                          expected="preview content rendered")
341	        else:
342	            ia03.set_fail(actual=f"html={preview_pane_html}", expected="> 200 chars",
343	                          error="Preview tab has no meaningful content")
344	        await capture_screenshot(page, "ia03_preview_tab", output_dir)
345	    else:
346	        ia03.set_info(actual="modal not opened", note="Skipped")
347	    results.append(ia03)
348	
349	    # --- IA04: Click Reasoning Chain tab -> chain entries ---
350	    ia04 = CheckResult("IA04", "Reasoning Chain tab has A->B->C->D structure", "IA. Citation Interactions")
351	    if modal_opened:
352	        await page.evaluate("switchChainTab('reasoning')")
353	        await page.wait_for_timeout(500)
354	        chain_blocks = await element_count(page, ".chain-reasoning-block")
355	        chain_steps = await element_count(page, ".chain-step")
356	        if chain_blocks > 0 and chain_steps >= 2:
357	            ia04.set_pass(actual=f"{chain_blocks} blocks, {chain_steps} steps", expected=">= 1 block with steps")
358	        else:
359	            ia04.set_fail(actual=f"{chain_blocks} blocks, {chain_steps} steps", expected=">= 1 block",
360	                          error="No reasoning chain structure")
361	    else:
362	        ia04.set_info(actual="modal not opened", note="Skipped")
363	    results.append(ia04)
364	
365	    # --- IA05: Click Metadata tab -> shows URL, source_type, scores ---
366	    ia05 = CheckResult("IA05", "Metadata tab shows URL, source_type, evidence details", "IA. Citation Interactions")
367	    if modal_opened:
368	        await page.evaluate("switchChainTab('metadata')")
369	        await page.wait_for_timeout(500)
370	        meta_tables = await element_count(page, ".chain-meta-table")
371	        meta_html_len = await page.evaluate(
372	            "() => { const p = document.getElementById('chain-pane-metadata'); return p ? p.innerHTML.length : 0; }"
373	        )
374	        if meta_tables > 0 and meta_html_len > 100:
375	            ia05.set_pass(actual=f"{meta_tables} tables, {meta_html_len} chars", expected="metadata rendered")
376	        else:
377	            ia05.set_fail(actual=f"{meta_tables} tables, {meta_html_len} chars", expected="metadata rendered",
378	                          error="No metadata content")
379	        await capture_screenshot(page, "ia05_metadata_tab", output_dir)
380	    else:
381	        ia05.set_info(actual="modal not opened", note="Skipped")
382	    results.append(ia05)
383	
384	    # --- IA06: Close modal, click 2nd .cite-ref -> NEW modal data loads (FIX-B2 verification) ---
385	    ia06 = CheckResult("IA06", "2nd citation loads fresh data (FIX-B2: _previewLoaded reset)", "IA. Citation Interactions")
386	    if modal_opened and cite_count >= 2:
387	        # Close current modal
388	        await page.evaluate("closeCitationChain()")

808	    )

811	    ic01 = CheckResult("IC01", "Click GOLD filter chip filters evidence", "IC. Evidence Browser")
812	    has_gold_chip = await page.evaluate(
813	        "() => !!document.querySelector('#tier-chips .filter-chip[data-tier=\"gold\"]')"

817	        await page.wait_for_timeout(500)

823	        )

825	            ic01.set_pass(actual=f"filter=gold, cards={gold_cards} (was {initial_cards})", expected="GOLD filter active")
826	        else:

830	    results.append(ic01)

832	    # --- IC02: Click SILVER filter chip -> filtered ---
833	    ic02 = CheckResult("IC02", "Click SILVER filter chip filters evidence", "IC. Evidence Browser")
834	    has_silver_chip = await page.evaluate(
835	        "() => !!document.querySelector('#tier-chips .filter-chip[data-tier=\"silver\"]')"
836	    )

978	async def run_metrics_interactions(page: Page) -> list[CheckResult]:
979	    """ID01-ID08: Verify metrics display matches state data."""
980	    results: list[CheckResult] = []

987	    ev_data = await page.evaluate(
988	        """() => {
989	            const el = document.getElementById('pm-evidence');
990	            const text = el ? el.textContent.trim() : '0';

992	        }"""

996	    else:

998	                      error=f"Mismatch: display={ev_data['display']} vs state={ev_data['state']}")
999	    results.append(id01)
1000	
1001	    # --- ID02: Faithfulness matches state ---

1003	    faith_data = await page.evaluate(
1004	        """() => {
1005	            const el = document.getElementById('pm-faith');
1006	            return {text: el ? el.textContent.trim() : '__NOT_FOUND__', state: state.faithfulness || 0};
1007	        }"""
1008	    )

1010	        id02.set_pass(actual=faith_data, expected="percentage display")

1012	        id02.set_pass(actual=faith_data, expected="faithfulness shown")

1016	
1017	    # --- ID03: Word count matches state ---

1020	        """() => {

1023	            return {display: parseInt(text) || 0, state: state.words || 0};

1034	    cost_text = await element_text(page, "#total-cost")
1035	    if cost_text != "__NOT_FOUND__" and "$" in cost_text:
1036	        id04.set_pass(actual=cost_text, expected="$X.XX format")
1037	    elif cost_text != "__NOT_FOUND__":
1038	        id04.set_info(actual=cost_text, note="Cost shown but no $ sign")
1039	    else:
1040	        id04.set_info(actual="not found", note="#total-cost element not found")
1041	    results.append(id04)
1042	
1043	    # --- ID05: Timer shows correct elapsed time (> 3600s for long pipeline) ---
1044	    id05 = CheckResult("ID05", "Timer shows > 3600s elapsed (long pipeline)", "ID. Metrics Display")
1045	    timer_text = await element_text(page, "#elapsed-time")
1046	    total_seconds = _parse_hms_to_seconds(timer_text)
1047	    if total_seconds > 3600:

1052	        id05.set_fail(actual=timer_text, expected="> 3600s", error="Timer not running or shows 0")

1054	
1055	    # --- ID06: Timer frozen (pipeline complete) ---
1056	    id06 = CheckResult("ID06", "Timer frozen (two readings 2s apart identical)", "ID. Metrics Display")
1057	    reading1 = await element_text(page, "#elapsed-time")

1110	# IE. Export & Action Buttons (IE01-IE05)
1111	# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
1112	async def run_export_interactions(page: Page, output_dir: Path) -> list[CheckResult]:
1113	    """IE01-IE05: Export button clicks, compose drawer."""
1114	    results: list[CheckResult] = []
1115	    await switch_to_operator_mode(page)
1116	    await switch_view(page, "report")
1117	    await page.wait_for_timeout(500)
1118	
1119	    # --- IE01: Click Markdown export -> download triggered ---
1120	    ie01 = CheckResult("IE01", "Markdown export triggers download", "IE. Export & Actions")
1121	    try:
1122	        async with page.expect_download(timeout=5000) as download_info:
1123	            await page.evaluate("exportReport('markdown')")
1124	        download = await download_info.value
1125	        ie01.set_pass(actual=f"downloaded: {download.suggested_filename}", expected="download triggered")
1126	    except Exception as exc:
1127	        # Fallback: check if Blob was created (download may not work in headless)
1128	        blob_created = await page.evaluate(
1129	            """() => {
1130	                try { exportReport('markdown'); return true; } catch(e) { return false; }
1131	            }"""
1132	        )
1133	        if blob_created:
1134	            ie01.set_info(actual="exportReport called", note=f"Download may not fire in headless: {exc}")
1135	        else:
1136	            ie01.set_fail(actual=str(exc), expected="download", error="Export failed")
1137	    results.append(ie01)
1138	
1139	    # --- IE02: Click JSONL export -> download ---
1140	    ie02 = CheckResult("IE02", "JSONL export triggers download", "IE. Export & Actions")
1141	    try:
1142	        async with page.expect_download(timeout=5000) as download_info:
1143	            await page.evaluate("exportReport('jsonl')")
1144	        download = await download_info.value
1145	        ie02.set_pass(actual=f"downloaded: {download.suggested_filename}", expected="download triggered")
1146	    except Exception as exc:
1147	        ie02.set_info(actual=str(exc)[:100], note="Download event may not fire in headless mode")
1148	    results.append(ie02)
1149	
1150	    # --- IE03: Word export ---
1151	    ie03 = CheckResult("IE03", "Word export triggers download", "IE. Export & Actions")
1152	    try:
1153	        async with page.expect_download(timeout=5000) as download_info:
1154	            await page.evaluate("exportReport('docx')")
1155	        download = await download_info.value
1156	        ie03.set_pass(actual=f"downloaded: {download.suggested_filename}", expected="download triggered")
1157	    except Exception as exc:
1158	        ie03.set_info(actual=str(exc)[:100], note="Word export may open print dialog instead")
1159	    results.append(ie03)
1160	
1161	    # --- IE04: Open compose drawer (Ctrl+K) ---
1162	    ie04 = CheckResult("IE04", "Compose drawer opens with Ctrl+K", "IE. Export & Actions")
1163	    await page.keyboard.press("Control+k")
1164	    await page.wait_for_timeout(500)
1165	    drawer_visible = await page.evaluate(
1166	        "() => { const d = document.getElementById('compose-drawer'); return d && d.classList.contains('visible'); }"
1167	    )
1168	    if drawer_visible:
1169	        textarea_exists = await element_exists(page, "#compose-query")
1170	        ie04.set_pass(actual=f"drawer visible, textarea={textarea_exists}", expected="drawer opens")
1171	        await capture_screenshot(page, "ie04_compose_drawer", output_dir)
1172	    else:
1173	        ie04.set_fail(actual="drawer not visible", expected="compose drawer opens",
1174	                      error="Ctrl+K did not open compose drawer")
1175	    results.append(ie04)
1176	
1177	    # --- IE05: Close compose drawer (Escape) ---
1178	    ie05 = CheckResult("IE05", "Compose drawer closes with Escape", "IE. Export & Actions")
1179	    if drawer_visible:
1180	        await page.keyboard.press("Escape")
1181	        await page.wait_for_timeout(500)
1182	        drawer_after = await page.evaluate(
1183	            "() => { const d = document.getElementById('compose-drawer'); return d && d.classList.contains('visible'); }"
1184	        )
1185	        if not drawer_after:
1186	            ie05.set_pass(actual="drawer closed", expected="drawer closes on Escape")
1187	        else:
1188	            ie05.set_fail(actual="drawer still visible", expected="closes on Escape",
1189	                          error="Escape did not close drawer")
1190	    else:
1191	        # Try opening with FAB
1192	        await page.evaluate("if (typeof openCompose === 'function') openCompose()")
1193	        await page.wait_for_timeout(300)
1194	        drawer_now = await page.evaluate(
1195	            "() => { const d = document.getElementById('compose-drawer'); return d && d.classList.contains('visible'); }"
1196	        )
1197	        if drawer_now:
1198	            await page.keyboard.press("Escape")
1199	            await page.wait_for_timeout(300)
1200	            drawer_after_esc = await page.evaluate(
1201	                "() => { const d = document.getElementById('compose-drawer'); return d && d.classList.contains('visible'); }"
1202	            )
1203	            if not drawer_after_esc:
1204	                ie05.set_pass(actual="opened via API, closed with Escape", expected="Escape closes drawer")
1205	            else:
1206	                ie05.set_fail(actual="still visible", expected="closes", error="Escape failed after openCompose()")
1207	        else:
1208	            ie05.set_info(actual="cannot open drawer", note="Skipped")
1209	    results.append(ie05)
1210	
1211	    return results

1217	async def run_realtime_interactions(page: Page) -> list[CheckResult]:
1218	    """IF01-IF05: SSE status, event counter, activity log."""

1226	    dot_class = await page.evaluate(
1227	        "() => { const el = document.getElementById('status-dot'); return el ? el.className : '__NOT_FOUND__'; }"
1228	    )

1237	    counter_text = await element_text(page, "#event-counter")

1250	    log_data = await page.evaluate(

1258	    )

1266	    # --- IF04: Activity log entries have icons ---

1268	    if log_data.get("count", 0) > 0:

1275	            }"""
1276	        )

1280	            if04.set_info(actual="no icon elements found", note="Icons may be text emoji")

1283	    results.append(if04)
1284	
1285	    # --- IF05: Phase rows in research view ---
1286	    if05 = CheckResult("IF05", "Phase rows present with done status", "IF. Real-Time Indicators")
1287	    phase_data = await page.evaluate(
1288	        """() => {
1289	            const rows = document.querySelectorAll('.phase-row, .step-item');

1291	            rows.forEach(r => { if (r.classList.contains('done') || r.classList.contains('completed')) doneCount++; });
1292	            return {total: rows.length, done: doneCount};
1293	        }"""
1294	    )
1295	    if phase_data["total"] > 0:
1296	        if05.set_pass(actual=f"{phase_data['total']} phases, {phase_data['done']} done", expected="> 0 phases")
1297	    else:
1298	        if05.set_fail(actual=phase_data, expected="> 0 phase rows", error="No phase rows found")
1299	    results.append(if05)
1300	
1301	    return results

1478	# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
1479	# IH. Console Errors & Robustness (IH01-IH04)
1480	# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
1481	async def run_robustness_checks(
1482	    page: Page, console_errors: list, network_errors: list, output_dir: Path
1483	) -> list[CheckResult]:
1484	    """IH01-IH04: Console errors, network failures, screenshots."""
1485	    results: list[CheckResult] = []
1486	
1487	    # --- IH01: No JS errors during interactions ---
1488	    ih01 = CheckResult("IH01", "No JS console errors during all interactions", "IH. Robustness")
1489	    known_non_critical = [
1490	        "favicon", "font", "manifest", ".ico", "service-worker",
1491	        "srcdoc", "sandbox", "failed to load resource",
1492	        "net::err", "googletagmanager", "analytics",
1493	    ]
1494	    critical_errors: list[str] = []
1495	    for err in console_errors:
1496	        err_text = str(err.text) if hasattr(err, "text") else str(err)
1497	        is_known = any(p in err_text.lower() for p in known_non_critical)
1498	        if not is_known:
1499	            critical_errors.append(err_text[:200])
1500	    if not critical_errors:
1501	        ih01.set_pass(actual=f"{len(console_errors)} total, 0 critical", expected="0 critical")
1502	    else:
1503	        ih01.set_fail(actual=f"{len(critical_errors)} critical errors",
1504	                      expected="0 critical", error="; ".join(critical_errors[:5]))
1505	    results.append(ih01)
1506	
1507	    # --- IH02: No unhandled promise rejections ---
1508	    ih02 = CheckResult("IH02", "No unhandled promise rejections", "IH. Robustness")
1509	    rejection_count = await page.evaluate(
1510	        "() => window.__ia_rejection_count || 0"
1511	    )
1512	    if rejection_count == 0:
1513	        ih02.set_pass(actual=0, expected=0)
1514	    else:
1515	        ih02.set_fail(actual=rejection_count, expected=0, error=f"{rejection_count} unhandled rejections")
1516	    results.append(ih02)
1517	
1518	    # --- IH03: No API 4xx/5xx errors ---
1519	    ih03 = CheckResult("IH03", "No API 4xx/5xx errors during interactions", "IH. Robustness")
1520	    api_errors = [e for e in network_errors if "/api/" in e.get("url", "")]
1521	    if not api_errors:
1522	        ih03.set_pass(actual="0 API errors", expected="0")
1523	    else:
1524	        ih03.set_fail(actual=f"{len(api_errors)} API errors",
1525	                      expected="0", error=str(api_errors[:3]))
1526	    results.append(ih03)
1527	
1528	    # --- IH04: Final full-page screenshot ---
1529	    ih04 = CheckResult("IH04", "Final screenshots captured for visual review", "IH. Robustness")
1530	    try:
1531	        path = await capture_screenshot(page, "ih04_final_state", output_dir)
1532	        ih04.set_pass(actual=path, expected="screenshot saved")
1533	        ih04.screenshot = path
1534	    except Exception as exc:
1535	        ih04.set_fail(actual=str(exc), expected="screenshot", error="Screenshot failed")
1536	    results.append(ih04)
1537	
1538	    return results

1541	# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
1542	# Helpers
1543	# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
1544	def _parse_hms_to_seconds(hms: str) -> int:
1545	    match = re.match(r"(\d{2}):(\d{2}):(\d{2})", hms)
1546	    if not match:
1547	        return 0
1548	    return int(match.group(1)) * 3600 + int(match.group(2)) * 60 + int(match.group(3))
1549	
1550	
1551	def _find_trace_file(cli_trace: str | None) -> Path:
1552	    """Resolve the trace file from CLI arg or fallback candidates."""
1553	    if cli_trace:
1554	        p = Path(cli_trace)
1555	        if p.exists():
1556	            return p
1557	    for candidate in _TRACE_CANDIDATES:
1558	        if candidate.exists():
1559	            return candidate
1560	    return _DEFAULT_TRACE

1563	# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
1564	# Report generation
1565	# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
1566	def generate_report(
1567	    results: list[CheckResult],
1568	    console_errors: list,
1569	    network_errors: list,
1570	    output_dir: Path,
1571	) -> dict:
1572	    by_category: dict[str, list[dict]] = {}
1573	    for r in results:
1574	        by_category.setdefault(r.category, []).append(r.to_dict())
1575	
1576	    total = len(results)
1577	    passed = sum(1 for r in results if r.passed)
1578	    failed = total - passed
1579	    info_count = sum(1 for r in results if r.severity == "info")
1580	
1581	    report = {
1582	        "audit": "polaris_interaction_audit",
1583	        "timestamp": datetime.now(timezone.utc).isoformat(),
1584	        "summary": {
1585	            "total_checks": total,
1586	            "passed": passed,
1587	            "failed": failed,
1588	            "info": info_count,
1589	            "pass_rate": f"{(passed / total * 100) if total > 0 else 0:.1f}%",
1590	        },
1591	        "categories": by_category,
1592	        "console_errors": [
1593	            str(e.text) if hasattr(e, "text") else str(e) for e in console_errors[:50]
1594	        ],
1595	        "network_errors": network_errors[:50],
1596	    }
1597	
1598	    output_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
1599	    report_path = output_dir / "audit_report.json"
1600	    with open(report_path, "w", encoding="utf-8") as fh:
1601	        json.dump(report, fh, indent=2, default=str)
1602	    logger.info("Report written: %s", report_path)
1603	    return report
1604	
1605	
1606	def print_console_summary(report: dict) -> None:
1607	    summary = report["summary"]
1608	    print("\n" + "=" * 72)
1609	    print("  POLARIS INTERACTION AUDIT (~58 checks / 8 categories)")
1610	    print("=" * 72)
1611	    print(f"  Total checks: {summary['total_checks']}")
1612	    print(f"  Passed:       {summary['passed']}")
1613	    print(f"  Failed:       {summary['failed']}")
1614	    print(f"  Info:         {summary['info']}")
1615	    print(f"  Pass rate:    {summary['pass_rate']}")
1616	    print("-" * 72)
1617	
1618	    for category_name, checks in report["categories"].items():
1619	        print(f"\n  {category_name}:")
1620	        for check in checks:
1621	            if check["severity"] == "info":
1622	                marker = "[INFO]"
1623	            elif check["passed"]:
1624	                marker = "[PASS]"
1625	            else:
1626	                marker = "[FAIL]"
1627	            line = f"    {marker} {check['check_id']}: {check['description']}"
1628	            if not check["passed"] and check.get("error") and check["severity"] != "info":
1629	                line += f"  -- {check['error']}"
1630	            elif check["severity"] == "info" and check.get("error"):
1631	                line += f"  -- {check['error']}"
1632	            print(line)
1633	
1634	    if report.get("console_errors"):
1635	        print(f"\n  Console Errors ({len(report['console_errors'])}):")
1636	        for err in report["console_errors"][:10]:
1637	            print(f"    - {err[:120]}")
1638	
1639	    if report.get("network_errors"):
1640	        print(f"\n  Network Errors ({len(report['network_errors'])}):")
1641	        for err in report["network_errors"][:5]:
1642	            print(f"    - {err}")
1643	
1644	    print("=" * 72 + "\n")
1645

1647	# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
1648	# Main audit workflow
1649	# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
1650	async def run_audit(
1651	    port: int,
1652	    output_dir: Path,
1653	    headed: bool = False,
1654	) -> dict:
1655	    """Execute the full ~58-check interaction audit."""
1656	    output_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
1657	
1658	    all_results: list[CheckResult] = []
1659	    console_errors: list = []
1660	    network_errors: list[dict] = []
1661	
1662	    async with async_playwright() as pw:
1663	        browser = await pw.chromium.launch(headless=not headed)
1664	        context = await browser.new_context(
1665	            viewport={"width": 1920, "height": 1080},
1666	            # Accept downloads for export tests
1667	            accept_downloads=True,
1668	        )
1669	        page = await context.new_page()
1670	        page.set_default_navigation_timeout(PAGE_LOAD_TIMEOUT_MS)
1671	
1672	        # Collect console errors
1673	        page.on(
1674	            "console",
1675	            lambda msg: console_errors.append(msg) if msg.type == "error" else None,
1676	        )
1677	
1678	        # Track network errors (4xx/5xx on API calls)
1679	        def on_response(response):
1680	            if response.status >= 400 and "/api/" in response.url:
1681	                network_errors.append({"url": response.url, "status": response.status})
1682	        page.on("response", on_response)
1683	
1684	        # Install unhandled rejection counter
1685	        await page.add_init_script("""
1686	            window.__ia_error_count = 0;
1687	            window.__ia_rejection_count = 0;
1688	            window.addEventListener('error', () => { window.__ia_error_count++; });
1689	            window.addEventListener('unhandledrejection', () => { window.__ia_rejection_count++; });
1690	        """)
1691	
1692	        # -----------------------------------------------------------
1693	        # 1. Page load + hydration
1694	        # -----------------------------------------------------------
1695	        dashboard_url = f"http://127.0.0.1:{port}/"
1696	        logger.info("Navigating to %s", dashboard_url)
1697	        await page.goto(dashboard_url, wait_until="domcontentloaded")
1698	
1699	        logger.info("Waiting for page scripts to initialize (3s)...")
1700	        await page.wait_for_timeout(3000)
1701	
1702	        logger.info(
1703	            "Waiting for hydration (target=%d events, timeout=%ds)...",
1704	            HYDRATION_TARGET, HYDRATION_TIMEOUT_S,
1705	        )
1706	        hydrated = await wait_for_hydration(page, HYDRATION_TARGET, HYDRATION_TIMEOUT_S)
1707	        if hydrated:
1708	            logger.info("Hydration complete.")
1709	        else:
1710	            event_count = await page.evaluate(
1711	                "() => { try { return state.eventCount || 0; } catch(e) { return 0; } }"
1712	            )
1713	            logger.warning(
1714	                "Hydration target not reached: %d/%d events. Proceeding anyway.",
1715	                event_count, HYDRATION_TARGET,
1716	            )
1717	
1718	        # -----------------------------------------------------------
1719	        # 2. Run interaction categories sequentially
1720	        # -----------------------------------------------------------
1721	        logger.info("Running IB. View Switching & Navigation (IB01-IB08)...")
1722	        all_results.extend(await run_navigation_interactions(page, output_dir))
1723	
1724	        logger.info("Running ID. Metrics & Data Display (ID01-ID08)...")
1725	        all_results.extend(await run_metrics_interactions(page))
1726	
1727	        logger.info("Running IC. Evidence Browser Interactions (IC01-IC07)...")
1728	        all_results.extend(await run_evidence_interactions(page, output_dir))
1729	
1730	        logger.info("Running IA. Citation System Interactions (IA01-IA13)...")
1731	        all_results.extend(await run_citation_interactions(page, output_dir))
1732	
1733	        logger.info("Running IE. Export & Action Buttons (IE01-IE05)...")
1734	        all_results.extend(await run_export_interactions(page, output_dir))
1735	
1736	        logger.info("Running IF. Real-Time Indicators (IF01-IF05)...")
1737	        all_results.extend(await run_realtime_interactions(page))
1738	
1739	        logger.info("Running IG. Workspace-Specific (IG01-IG08)...")
1740	        all_results.extend(await run_workspace_interactions(page, output_dir))
1741	
1742	        logger.info("Running IH. Console Errors & Robustness (IH01-IH04)...")
1743	        all_results.extend(await run_robustness_checks(page, console_errors, network_errors, output_dir))
1744	
1745	        # -----------------------------------------------------------
1746	        # 3. Cleanup
1747	        # -----------------------------------------------------------
1748	        await browser.close()
1749	
1750	    # -----------------------------------------------------------
1751	    # 4. Report
1752	    # -----------------------------------------------------------
1753	    report = generate_report(all_results, console_errors, network_errors, output_dir)
1754	    print_console_summary(report)
1755	    return report
1756	
1757	
1758	# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
1759	# CLI entry point
1760	# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
1761	def main():
1762	    parser = argparse.ArgumentParser(description="POLARIS Interaction Audit")
1763	    parser.add_argument("--port", type=int, default=0, help="Server port (0 = auto)")
1764	    parser.add_argument("--output-dir", type=str, default=str(_DEFAULT_OUTPUT_DIR))
1765	    parser.add_argument("--trace", type=str, default=None, help="Path to JSONL trace file")
1766	    parser.add_argument("--headed", action="store_true", help="Run browser in headed mode")
1767	    args = parser.parse_args()
1768	
1769	    trace_file = _find_trace_file(args.trace)
1770	    if not trace_file.exists():
1771	        logger.error("Trace file not found: %s", trace_file)
1772	        logger.error("Searched: %s", [str(c) for c in _TRACE_CANDIDATES])
1773	        sys.exit(1)
1774	    logger.info("Using trace file: %s", trace_file)
1775	
1776	    output_dir = Path(args.output_dir)
1777	    port = args.port or find_free_port()
1778	
1779	    # Start server
1780	    server_proc = start_server(port, str(trace_file), output_dir)
1781	    try:
1782	        # Wait for server readiness
1783	        logger.info("Waiting for server on port %d...", port)
1784	        ready = asyncio.run(wait_for_server(port, SERVER_READY_TIMEOUT_S))
1785	        if not ready:
1786	            logger.error("Server failed to start within %ds", SERVER_READY_TIMEOUT_S)
1787	            sys.exit(1)
1788	        logger.info("Server ready on port %d", port)
1789	
1790	        # Run the audit
1791	        report = asyncio.run(run_audit(port, output_dir, headed=args.headed))
1792	
1793	        # Exit code based on critical failures
1794	        failed = report["summary"]["failed"]
1795	        info = report["summary"]["info"]
1796	        real_failures = failed  # info checks don't count as failures
1797	        if real_failures > 0:
1798	            logger.warning("%d interaction checks FAILED", real_failures)
1799	            sys.exit(1)
1800	        else:
1801	            logger.info("All interaction checks PASSED (%d info)", info)
1802	            sys.exit(0)
1803	
1804	    finally:
1805	        stop_server(server_proc)
1806

1808	if __name__ == "__main__":

1	"""
2	Playwright UI audit — checks the live dashboard state without any API calls.
3	Takes a screenshot and evaluates UI state via injected JS.
4	"""
5	import json
6	import sys
7	from pathlib import Path
8	from playwright.sync_api import sync_playwright
9	
10	URL = sys.argv[1] if len(sys.argv) > 1 else "http://localhost:8765"
11	SCREENSHOT_DIR = Path("outputs/ui_audit")
12	SCREENSHOT_DIR.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
13	
14	UI_CHECK_JS = Path("scripts/ui_check.js").read_text(encoding="utf-8")
15	
16	def run_audit():
17	    with sync_playwright() as p:
18	        browser = p.chromium.launch(headless=True)
19	        ctx = browser.new_context(viewport={"width": 1440, "height": 900})
20	        page = ctx.new_page()
21	
22	        js_errors = []
23	        page.on("pageerror", lambda err: js_errors.append(str(err)))
24	
25	        console_msgs = []
26	        page.on("console", lambda msg: console_msgs.append(f"[{msg.type}] {msg.text}"))
27	
28	        print(f"Navigating to {URL} ...")
29	        page.goto(URL, wait_until="domcontentloaded", timeout=15000)
30	        # Wait for SSE connection and hydration
31	        page.wait_for_timeout(4000)
32	
33	        # Take screenshot
34	        ss_path = SCREENSHOT_DIR / "ui_audit.png"
35	        page.screenshot(path=str(ss_path), full_page=True)
36	        print(f"Screenshot saved: {ss_path}")
37	
38	        # Evaluate UI state
39	        ui_state = page.evaluate(UI_CHECK_JS)
40	        print("\n=== UI STATE ===")
41	        for k, v in ui_state.items():
42	            print(f"  {k}: {v}")
43	
44	        # Check for JS errors
45	        if js_errors:
46	            print(f"\n=== JS ERRORS ({len(js_errors)}) ===")
47	            for e in js_errors[:10]:
48	                print(f"  {e[:200]}")
49	        else:
50	            print("\n  0 JS errors")
51	
52	        # Check key console messages
53	        sse_msgs = [m for m in console_msgs if "SSE" in m or "hydrat" in m.lower() or "pipeline" in m.lower() or "phase" in m.lower()]
54	        if sse_msgs:
55	            print(f"\n=== KEY CONSOLE MSGS ({len(sse_msgs)}) ===")
56	            for m in sse_msgs[:15]:
57	                print(f"  {m[:200]}")
58	
59	        # Detect visible panels
60	        panels = page.evaluate("""() => {
61	            var r = {};
62	            var ws = document.getElementById('workspace-panel');
63	            r.workspaceVisible = ws ? (ws.offsetWidth > 0 && ws.offsetHeight > 0) : false;
64	
65	            var landing = document.getElementById('landing-section');
66	            r.landingVisible = landing ? (landing.offsetWidth > 0 && landing.offsetHeight > 0) : false;
67	
68	            var idle = document.getElementById('ws-idle-brief');
69	            r.idleBriefVisible = idle ? (idle.offsetWidth > 0 && idle.offsetHeight > 0) : false;
70	
71	            var thread = document.getElementById('ws-thread');
72	            r.threadVisible = thread ? (thread.offsetWidth > 0 && thread.offsetHeight > 0) : false;
73	
74	            var progress = document.getElementById('ws-active-progress');
75	            r.progressBlockVisible = progress ? (progress.offsetWidth > 0 && progress.offsetHeight > 0) : false;
76	
77	            var report = document.getElementById('ws-report');
78	            r.reportVisible = report ? (report.offsetWidth > 0 && report.offsetHeight > 0) : false;
79	
80	            var nav = document.getElementById('operator-nav');
81	            r.operatorNavVisible = nav ? (nav.offsetWidth > 0 && nav.offsetHeight > 0) : false;
82	
83	            // Check what's showing in the source brief area
84	            var briefContent = document.getElementById('ws-idle-brief-content');
85	            r.briefHasContent = briefContent ? (briefContent.textContent.trim().length > 0) : false;
86	
87	            // Check sidebar sections
88	            var sidebar = document.getElementById('ws-sidebar');
89	            r.sidebarVisible = sidebar ? (sidebar.offsetWidth > 0) : false;
90	
91	            return r;
92	        }""")
93	        print("\n=== PANEL VISIBILITY ===")
94	        for k, v in panels.items():
95	            print(f"  {k}: {v}")
96	
97	        # Overall assessment
98	        print("\n=== ASSESSMENT ===")
99	        if ui_state.get("pipelineActive"):
100	            if ui_state.get("wsPhase") == "running":
101	                print("  OK: Pipeline active, workspace in RUNNING phase")
102	                if ui_state.get("progressBlock"):
103	                    print("  OK: Progress block present")
104	                else:
105	                    print("  BUG: Progress block MISSING during active pipeline")
106	                if ui_state.get("metricsRow"):
107	                    print("  OK: Metrics row present (F07)")
108	                else:
109	                    print("  BUG: Metrics row MISSING (F07)")
110	            else:
111	                print(f"  BUG: Pipeline active but wsPhase={ui_state.get('wsPhase')} (should be 'running')")
112	        elif ui_state.get("pipelineComplete"):
113	            if ui_state.get("wsPhase") == "report":
114	                print("  OK: Pipeline complete, workspace in REPORT phase")
115	            else:
116	                print(f"  INFO: Pipeline complete, wsPhase={ui_state.get('wsPhase')}")
117	        else:
118	            print(f"  INFO: No pipeline active. wsPhase={ui_state.get('wsPhase')}, viewMode={ui_state.get('viewMode')}")
119	
120	        if ui_state.get("hasSearchedZero"):
121	            print("  BUG: 'Searched 0 sources' still present (F01)")
122	        else:
123	            print("  OK: No 'Searched 0 sources' spam (F01)")
124	
125	        browser.close()
126	        return ui_state, panels, js_errors
127	
128	if __name__ == "__main__":
129	    run_audit()
